title: tree__*.json — nested call tree emitted by lsp_tree.py --format json
description: Lifted verbatim from the in-memory `node` shape in scripts/lsp_tree.py (see TreeWalker.walk, lines 433-620). `tag` values are the exact terminal states the walker emits when it cannot recurse.

call_name.description: Name of the call as it appears at the call site.

symbol.description: Resolved symbol (e.g., '(*TransactionService).charge_payment_gateway'). May equal call_name for root nodes.

file.description: Project-relative path to the definition. Absent on the root before LSP resolution.

start_line.description: 1-indexed start line of the symbol definition.
